title: IISER Mohali – Non Teaching – 40 Posts
shortInfo: IISER Mohali Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 40 vacancies across Punjab. Candidates with Any Bachelors Degree, B.Tech/B.E, 10TH, Any Masters Degree, M.Sc, MCA, M.Lib, BS Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 03-05-2026, and closes on 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IISER Mohali website, iisermohali.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: IISER Mohali Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Attendant, Junior Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: IISER Mohali Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 40 vacancies across Punjab. Candidates with Any Bachelors Degree, B.Tech/B.E, 10TH, Any Masters Degree, M.Sc, MCA, M.Lib, BS Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 03-05-2026, and closes on 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IISER Mohali website, iisermohali.ac.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research, Mohali (Ministry of Education, Govt. of India)

age_limit.age_details: Written Test / Skill Test / Interview - as applicable per post (venue decided by IISER Mohali)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education/Sports Sciences with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade with 3 years of relevant full-time experience after Bachelor's Degree

salary_details.pay_scale: As per 7th CPC Pay Matrix - Level 1 to Level 13 depending on post

selection_process: Written Test / Skill Test / Interview (as applicable per post)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only at erp.iisermohali.ac.in. Applications received in hard copy format or any other mode will be summarily rejected. The last date is 15/06/2026 up to 05:00 PM. Candidates are advised to submit well before the closing date to avoid connectivity issues due to heavy load on the website. Once submitted, the application cannot be withdrawn under any circumstances and no editing will be allowed. All correspondence including admit cards will be sent to the registered email ID only - no hard copy letters will be sent.
seo_tags: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Mohali Non Teaching Recruitment 2026
